text:
Created attachment 193008
Proposed patch (since 468168 revision)

Patch to update print/ft2demos port from 2.9 to 2.9.1 version.

Look following link for changes:
http://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/freetype/freetype2-demos.git/tree/ChangeLog?h=VER-2-9-1

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.4 amd64.
